title: AI code refactoring: Strategic approaches to enterprise software modernization in 2025
summary: This blog post examines enterprise AI code refactoring, which uses machine learning to automatically restructure and optimize existing code while preserving functionality. It outlines strategic implementation practices, including prioritizing high-impact components, establishing quality gates, training teams, and systematically measuring technical debt reduction. Real-world applications from financial services, healthcare, and e-commerce illustrate how phased, risk-managed approaches yield better outcomes. The post emphasizes that treating AI refactoring as an engineering discipline rather than a simple tool deployment leads to significant improvements in development velocity, code quality, and maintenance costs.
author: GetDX
